title: Coogam Wooden Sorting & Stacking Toys, Shape Color Recognition Geometric Blocks Matching Puzzle with Lacing String, Educational Preschool Learning Board Game Gift
features: Matching Shape Puzzle Comes: 3 in 1 educational toddler toy plays with the different shape concept in multipul way. Learning shapes, colors and counting as well. Small size board measures 5.1x 5.7x 2 inch.
Geometric Stack Blocks: contains 16 pieces perfectly sanded shapes, can be stacked by size. No sharpe or rough edges and the paint is durable.

Multi-Play Methods: stack it in accordance with the order from large to small, from red to blue, get the right shape into the correct pegs. Or build it in cute patterns to learn object. Amazing watching kids develop.

Helpful Teaching Tool : this wooden sorting board is a well constructed toy for learning. Supports motor skills, matching, making patterns, counting, problem solving, and help with hand eye coordination and dexterity. All the learning fun.
Kids’ Wishlist: awesome and engaging toy! Skip the electronics, and try this type of toy. Nice sized pieces for a birthday or baby shower! Christmas gift idea as well perfect for toddlers learning.
description: Product Description Wooden Sorting Matching Puzzle Shape Color Recognition Geometric Blocks Solid, engaging, brain-building toy Practice counting with the holes, pegs, sides of each piece and the pieces themselves, thread the circle and stacks the others. Great value, sturdy, self-correcting. A must have product to see your kids enjoy showing off knowledge of colors and shapes. A well constructed toy for learning Compact size and good for travel too, very lightweight. Would be a great gift as well perfect for toddlers learning shapes and colors and problem solving with this puzzle. Keeps them entertained for a while which is great! MULTI-USE stacking blocks toy Can build it, stack it , and thread it, learn shapes and colors. Also a single type of shape fits only one stand. Sturdy construction, the bright colors and nice side pieces are easy to manipulate. Great for hand eye coordination and sorting skills pre-math skills. Time taking and enjoying Put all the shapes where they need to be. Great for cognitive and spacial intelligence development, help babies improve their cognitive and special intelligence. Specification: Size: 5.1x 5.7x 2 inch Weight: 1lb Color: Red, blue, green, yellow Educational Value: Numeracy & Spacial Awareness Material: Sturdy wood Packaging: Gift box More Details of Wood Stacking Puzzle Sturdy pegs Practice counting with the holes, pegs, sides of each piece and the pieces themselves, thread the circle and stacks the others. Excellent learning and interactive toy. Bright Color It doesn't just teach shapes but also colors and how to place them correctly. The motor skills of taking them off and putting them back on is fantastic. Stack it by size Attempt to put the shapes on the pegs. Great to practice pincer grasp with the holes.Each shape fits in a specific pattern of posts. Enjoy lining up all of the pegs and stacking!
